news.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Decline as Chip Stocks Drop; UnitedHealth Shares Aid Dow

news.title: I Keep Buying Seagate Because It Has One Massive Cost Advantage Others Don’t

news.title: The SOX Index Fell 16% in Less Than a Month
news.summary: The same chipmakers that have been investors' AI darlings are some of the biggest drags on today's market. The PHLX Semiconductor Index is down 2.3% today, a 16% drop from the index's closing high, according to Dow Jones Market Data.
